title: More Animals 2
description: The second and improved version of More Animals is here! An ideal modpack for animals lovers!
body:
[![Banner](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/More_Animals_2/BH_MA2_header.webp)](https://bit.ly/4nTC2p4) Due to many requests, we have published most of our modpacks on Modrinth. But keep the following in mind: - There are many **content and optimization** mods that can't be added to Modrinth (they don't allow it). - The **quests files have been added**, but we cannot add FTB Quests to the modpack in Modrinth. You can add it yourself so you can play with them. - We are also **unable to upload serverpacks** here. **If you want to play with the full experience, we strongly recommend that you download the [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/more-animals-exclusive) version.** ## More Animals 2 is an exclusive version of our original More Animals thematic modpack. In this version you will find a much more ambitious modpack, with a much higher amount of mods, and with a single purpose, to have a great time! Our goal is that this modpack will contain everything you may need, from adventure mods, combat, enemies, technology, decoration, even quests in future updates, although of course, the main theme will be animals, we will add many animal mods that you will surely love! Please note that for Minecraft 1.21.1 there are still very few animal mods, so we recommend that you keep an eye out for future updates of our modpack. ### Do you need a server to play with your friends? ###

If you are looking for a server to play any modpack with your friends, [**Bisect Hosting**](https://bit.ly/4nTC2p4) is your solution! They have the best quality-price Minecraft servers, and with the code "Lupin" you will receive a 25% discount. ![Summary](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/More_Animals_2/BH_MA2_summary.webp) More Animals 2 is the improved version of our animal-themed modpack, but exclusive for Minecraft 1.21.1 onwards. We hope you enjoy creating this modpack as much as we did! 🔊 Immersion is essential in More Animals 2! It will be as if you were inside the game, thanks to mods such as AmbientSounds, Sound Physics Remastered, Visual Workbench, Falling Leaves, YDM's Weapon Master, among others. 🦁 We've added a lot of animal mods, and some mods are still to come... For now, you can find mods like Living Things, Aquaculture 2 or Fish of Thieves, among others! ⛰️ You will discover new biomes and structures as you explore, exploration and adventure is essential in this modpack, therefore, we have added Geophilic, Explorify or Dungeon Crawl. 🌽 And don't forget about food, Farmer's Delight, as well as some add-ons have also been added! As well as the incredible Cooking for Blockheads. 😎 Of course, the modpack has the best optimization mods for NeoForge, and we would like to highlight the presence of Sodium and Iris Shaders, two mods very dear to the community, which also allow us to make use of shaders. ![FAQ](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/More_Animals_2/BH_MA2_faq.webp) ### Minecraft keeps loading? You enter the world but your FPS is low? ### Please make sure to [increase the RAM](https://mundominecraft.net/en/allocate-more-ram/) in case you need it, most problems are due to this. If you use the curseforge app, it's as easy as clicking on profile options, uncheck the option to use default memory system and move the bar to the right (at least we recommend 6GB or 6144 MB). ### Is there an error with your server? ### Unfortunately, when setting up a server on your own, or hiring a hosting that I have not recommended, the modpack may not work. All my modpacks work perfectly with **[Bisect Hosting](https://bit.ly/4nTC2p4)**, so I recommend 100% to hire such hosting. Also, you will get a **[25% discount if you do it through this link](https://bit.ly/4nTC2p4)** and use the code "Lupin". Please note that for this modpack, we recommend a minimum of 8GB of RAM. If you are a large number of players, you should consider increasing the amount of RAM even more. ![Screenshots](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/More_Animals_2/BH_MA2_screenshot.webp) ![Screenshots 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/mwh31rWj/images/d4e07d0860467af97934319b804be4d37ec8fcfa.jpeg) ![Screenshots 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/mwh31rWj/images/3ea0b8360f28511e14b8e7d624dfb8b291028d6e.jpeg) ![Screenshots 3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/mwh31rWj/images/8d67a914d8b49a882919e212a4d8d4e4c8eefa07.jpeg) [![DISCORD](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/MultiRecipe/BH_Lupin_Discord.webp)](https://discord.gg/X8VY5WMbe4) .
